summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VivaLusa European shipping system. Backend APIs fully functional with correct shipping zones and pricing. Frontend cart persistence issue prevents complete checkout flow testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Cart state not persisting between page navigations
ui_bugs.selector: Cart items lost when navigating from product page to cart page

integration_issues.issue: Cannot complete full checkout flow due to cart state loss

passed_tests: Currency selector working (EUR, USD, GBP, etc.)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix cart state persistence issue in frontend. Cart items are lost when navigating between pages, preventing users from completing checkout flow. Check CartContext implementation and localStorage/sessionStorage usage.
